description_long: This is an adult woman with a professional appearance, featuring a collared, long-sleeve shirt tucked into fitted trousers. Her hair is styled in a voluminous ponytail that extends down her back, and her facial features are softly defined. She stands upright with arms slightly outstretched and fingers relaxed, suggesting a neutral, at-ease posture. The shirt is buttoned up to the collar, and the trousers are straight-legged, ending just above a pair of heeled shoes. The overall look is business-casual, suitable for an office or urban environment. No accessories or carried items are visible.
description: A professionally dressed adult woman in a collared shirt, fitted trousers, and heeled shoes, standing upright with a ponytail hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, facial features, and straight posture with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail hairstyle, profile of the face, and the fitted nature of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the ponytail, the back of the shirt, and the fit of the trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ponytail, and the side seam of the trousers.
attribute_clothing_type: button-up collared shirt and fitted trousers in a business-casual style
